allow: PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit 2>$null; $autres = $out | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "supabase/types\\.ts" -and $_ -match "error" }; "Erreurs hors types.ts : $\($autres.Count\)"; $autres | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell($out = npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json 2>&1; \($out | Select-String -Pattern "^src/" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\\('\)[0] } | Sort-Object -Unique\))

PowerShell($vite = "C:\\Users\\o.karmaoui\\Downloads\\deploi-app-last\\deploie-app-main\\node_modules\\.vite"; if \(Test-Path $vite\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $vite; "Cache Vite supprimé: $vite" } else { "Pas de cache .vite à supprimer" })

PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { python -m py_compile "donut-service\\app.py"; if \($?\) { "OK: syntaxe valide \($\($py.Source\)\)" } } else { "python non installé sur cette machine" })

Bash(awk -F= '/^E2E_EMAIL=/{print \($2=="ton-email-de-test"\)?"EMAIL = PLACEHOLDER non remplacé":"EMAIL = valeur personnalisée \(OK\)"} /^E2E_PASSWORD=/{print \($2=="ton-mot-de-passe-de-test"\)?"PASSWORD = PLACEHOLDER non remplacé":"PASSWORD = valeur personnalisée \(OK\)"}' .env)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed PID $_" } catch {} } } else { "port 3000 libre" })
Bash(python -c "import pydantic, rapidfuzz; print\('pydantic', pydantic.VERSION\); print\('rapidfuzz', rapidfuzz.__version__\)")
Bash(python -m pip install --quiet --disable-pip-version-check --trusted-host pypi.org --trusted-host files.pythonhosted.org rapidfuzz)
Bash(timeout 90 npx -y supabase@latest gen types typescript --project-id nvqywbyylpubjnsafyrj)
Bash(node -e "const t=require\('./tsconfig.json'\); console.log\('strict:', t.compilerOptions && t.compilerOptions.strict, '| noEmit:', t.compilerOptions&&t.compilerOptions.noEmit\)")

Bash(printf '\\n# --- File de traitement documentaire \(BullMQ / Redis\) ---\\n# Décommentez pour activer le mode QUEUE \(worker séparé\). Absent → mode INLINE.\\n# REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379\\nWORKER_CONCURRENCY=4\\nJOB_TIMEOUT_MS=120000\\nJOB_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3\\n')

Bash(printf '\\n# --- File de traitement documentaire \(BullMQ / Redis\) ---\\n# REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379   # décommentez après `npm run redis:up` pour le mode QUEUE\\nWORKER_CONCURRENCY=4\\nJOB_TIMEOUT_MS=120000\\nJOB_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3\\n')
Bash(PERF_ITER=1 npx vitest run --config vitest.perf.config.ts e2e/perf/pipeline-ia.perf.ts)

Bash(awk -F= '/^SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=/{v=$2; gsub\(/[" ]/,"",v\); print "SERVICE_ROLE_KEY length:", length\(v\)} /^SUPABASE_URL=/{print "URL:", $2} /^SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=/{v=$2; gsub\(/[" ]/,"",v\); print "PUBLISHABLE_KEY length:", length\(v\)}' .env)

Bash(node -e "const nm=require\('nodemailer'\); const t=nm.createTransport\({host:'smtp.example.com',port:587,secure:false,auth:{user:'u',pass:'p'},pool:true,tls:{rejectUnauthorized:true,servername:'smtp.example.com'}}\); console.log\('nodemailer OK, transporter created:', !!t\);")

PowerShell(npx playwright test e2e/tests/onboarding-quota.spec.ts --grep "inscription en 2" --reporter=line 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 3000,3001\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "port $p : serveur arrêté \(pid $\($c.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "port $p : libre" } })
